description_long: This is a compact, modern chaise with a mustard yellow upholstered body and a gently curved backrest that wraps around the sides, creating a cozy, enclosed seating area. The backrest features subtle vertical channel tufting, adding a touch of texture and visual interest to the otherwise smooth fabric. The seat cushion is thick and appears integrated, providing a plush and comfortable sitting surface. The chaise stands on four slender, straight legs made of dark-colored metal, giving it a contemporary and slightly elevated appearance. The overall silhouette is rounded and inviting, with no sharp edges or protruding elements. This piece would fit well in urban parks, public waiting areas, or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A mustard yellow, modern chaise with a curved, channel-tufted backrest and slim dark metal legs. Its rounded, plush design offers a cozy and contemporary seating option.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved, channel-tufted backrest and wide seat.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the rounded backrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous backrest and both rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the chaise's curvature and leg placement.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium height, smoothly curved, and wraps around both sides, featuring vertical channel tufting for added texture and visual interest.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has integrated armrests formed by the curved extension of the backrest on both sides.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of dark metal, with a simple, modern design and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid mustard yellow fabric with vertical channel tufting on the backrest, giving it a subtle, textured appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick, integrated seat cushion and an attached backrest; no loose or additional cushions are visible.
